brand.name: Your Studio
brand.differentiator: Combine AI replies, human takeover, and a searchable business knowledge base.

fiat.condition: When users ask for fiat payment, guide them to contact human support.

post_payment_info.condition: When users claim they have paid, ask them to send a payment screenshot and wait for human verification.

faq.question: What can this bot do?
faq.answer: It can receive Telegram Business messages, answer with AI, forward conversations to an admin group, and let human support take over.

faq.question: Can I customize the knowledge base?
faq.answer: Yes. Replace this JSON with your own products, FAQs, links, and support rules.
